query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "efficientrollout: system-aware self-speculative decoding for rl rollou" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (self-speculative decoding) and variables (acceptance rates, architectural impact on decoding efficiency) as the user's question, specifically extending the "EfficientRollout" concept to hybrid architectures. It provides the necessary canonical prior work on the specific technique (self-speculative decoding) and its system-aware variations that a literature review on this topic would require.
